    Index

    A B C D E F G H I K L M N O P R S T U V W X Y 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values

    A

    addBonus(int, int, int, int) - Method in class logic.creatures.Player
    Adds stat bonuses to the player, typically when equipping an item.
    addCount(int) - Method in class logic.util.ItemCounter
    Increases the quantity by the given amount.
    addItem(BaseItem, int) - Method in class logic.creatures.Player
    Adds the specified amount of an item to the player's inventory.
    advanceToNextBoss() - Method in class scenes.boss.BossController
    Advances the battle to the next boss if one exists.
    aggro - Variable in class scenes.game.GameController.MonsterEntity
    true when the monster is chasing the player.
    ALL_CLEAR - Enum constant in enum class scenes.boss.BossController.ActionResult
    All bosses were defeated.
    ALL_CLEAR - Enum constant in enum class scenes.boss.BossController.BattleState
    All three bosses have been defeated.
    application - package application
     
    atk - Variable in class logic.base.BaseArmor
    Attack bonus granted to the player when this armor is equipped.
    attack - Variable in class logic.base.BaseCreature
    Base attack power of this creature.
    attack(BaseCreature) - Method in class logic.base.BaseCreature
    Performs an attack on the target creature.
    attack(BaseCreature) - Method in class logic.creatures.Monster
    Attacks the target creature by dealing damage equal to this monster's attack stat.
    attack(BaseCreature) - Method in class logic.creatures.Player
    Performs a basic attack on the target, dealing damage equal to the player's attack stat.
    audio - package audio
     
    AudioManager - Class in audio
    Manages background music playback for the game.
    AudioManager() - Constructor for class audio.AudioManager
     

    B

    BaseArmor - Class in logic.base
    Abstract base class for all armor items.
    BaseArmor(String, int, int, int, int, int) - Constructor for class logic.base.BaseArmor
    Creates a new armor with the given stat bonuses and crafting cost.
    BaseCreature - Class in logic.base
    Abstract base class for all creatures in the game (players and monsters).
    BaseCreature(int, int, int) - Constructor for class logic.base.BaseCreature
    Creates a new creature with the given stats.
    BaseItem - Class in logic.base
    The base class for all items in the game.
    BaseItem(String) - Constructor for class logic.base.BaseItem
    Creates a stackable item with a default max stack of 64.
    BaseItem(String, boolean, int) - Constructor for class logic.base.BaseItem
    Creates a new item with the specified name, stackability, and max stack size.
    BasePotion - Class in logic.base
    Abstract base class for all potions.
    BasePotion(String, int) - Constructor for class logic.base.BasePotion
    Creates a new potion with the given name and heal amount.
    baseStone - Class in logic.stone
    Abstract base class for all mineable ore and stone nodes in the game world.
    baseStone(String, int, int) - Constructor for class logic.stone.baseStone
    Creates a new stone node with the given name, durability, and drop amount.
    BaseWeapon - Class in logic.base
    Abstract base class for all weapons.
    BaseWeapon(String, int, double, int) - Constructor for class logic.base.BaseWeapon
    Creates a new weapon with the given stats.
    BattleMenuController - Class in scenes.boss
    Manages the in-battle sub-menu state and skill cooldowns for the boss fight.
    BattleMenuController() - Constructor for class scenes.boss.BattleMenuController
     
    BattleMenuController.MenuState - Enum Class in scenes.boss
    Represents which sub-menu is currently visible.
    BattleMenuController.PotionEntry - Record Class in scenes.boss
    A lightweight view-model wrapping an ItemCounter for potions in the heal menu.
    berserkDebuff() - Method in record class logic.creatures.Player.SkillResult
    Returns the value of the berserkDebuff record component.
    BigHealthPotion - Class in logic.item.potion
    A large health potion that restores 200 HP when consumed.
    BigHealthPotion() - Constructor for class logic.item.potion.BigHealthPotion
    Creates a new BigHealthPotion.
    born - Variable in class scenes.game.GameController.FloatingText
    System time (ms) when this text was created.
    BOSS - Enum constant in enum class scenes.game.GameController.BuildingType
     
    BOSS_DEFEATED - Enum constant in enum class scenes.boss.BossController.ActionResult
    The current boss was defeated and another boss remains.
    BossController - Class in scenes.boss
    Controller for the sequential boss battle system.
    BossController(Player) - Constructor for class scenes.boss.BossController
    Creates a new BossController for the given player and initialises the first boss.
    BossController.ActionResult - Enum Class in scenes.boss
    Represents the outcome of a player or enemy action for the view to react to.
    BossController.BattleState - Enum Class in scenes.boss
    Represents the current phase of the turn-based battle.
    BossController.BossInfo - Record Class in scenes.boss
    Immutable data holder for a boss entry (name, monster instance, and theme colour).
    BossInfo(String, Monster, Color) - Constructor for record class scenes.boss.BossController.BossInfo
    Creates an instance of a BossInfo record class.
    BossView - Class in scenes.boss
    JavaFX view for the boss battle scene.
    BossView(BossController, Pickaxe[]) - Constructor for class scenes.boss.BossView
    Creates a new BossView.
    build() - Method in class scenes.boss.BossView
    Builds and returns the complete boss battle Scene.
    build() - Method in class scenes.boss.HealMenuView
    Builds the overlay Pane containing the canvas and dynamic buttons.
    build() - Method in class scenes.boss.SkillMenuView
    Builds the overlay Pane (invisible by default).
    build() - Method in class scenes.crafting.CraftingView
    Builds and returns the complete crafting overlay Pane.
    build() - Method in class scenes.gameover.GameOverView
    Builds and returns the game-over Scene, including the animated canvas, result headline, stats panel, and "Main Menu" / "Quit" buttons.
    build() - Method in class scenes.inventory.InventoryView
    Builds and returns the complete inventory overlay Pane.
    build() - Method in class scenes.mainmenu.MainMenuView
    Builds and returns the main-menu Scene, including the animated starfield canvas, game title, and "Play" / "Quit" buttons.
    build() - Method in class scenes.shop.ShopView
    Builds and returns the complete shop overlay Pane.
    buildScene() - Method in class scenes.game.GameView
    Builds and returns the main game Scene with all input handlers and the game loop.
    buildStatSuffix(BaseItem) - Method in class scenes.inventory.InventoryController
    Builds a short display suffix showing the item's stat bonus or equipped status.
    buy(ShopController.ShopItem) - Method in class scenes.shop.ShopController
    Attempts to purchase the given item.
    Buyable - Interface in interfaces
    Represents an item that can be purchased from a shop.
    BuyResult(boolean, String) - Constructor for record class scenes.shop.ShopController.BuyResult
    Creates an instance of a BuyResult record class.

    C

    canCraft(Player) - Method in interface interfaces.Craftable
    Checks whether the player has enough materials and gold to craft this item.
    canCraft(Player) - Method in class logic.base.BaseArmor
    Checks whether the player has enough gold and materials to craft this armor.
    canCraft(Player) - Method in class logic.base.BaseWeapon
    Checks whether the player has enough gold and materials to craft this weapon.
    checkBuildingEntry() - Method in class scenes.game.GameController
    Checks whether the player is standing adjacent to a building and returns its type.
    clampPage() - Method in class scenes.inventory.InventoryController
    Ensures currentPage stays within the valid range [0, totalPages-1].
    clearAttackAnimFlag() - Method in class scenes.boss.BossController
    Clears the pending attack animation flag after the view has consumed it.
    clearBossShakeFlag() - Method in class scenes.boss.BossController
    Clears the pending boss shake flag after the view has consumed it.
    clearPlayerShakeFlag() - Method in class scenes.boss.BossController
    Clears the pending player shake flag after the view has consumed it.
    close() - Method in class scenes.boss.BattleMenuController
    Closes any open sub-menu.
    color - Variable in class scenes.game.GameController.FloatingText
    The colour of the text.
    color() - Method in record class scenes.boss.BossController.BossInfo
    Returns the value of the color record component.
    COLS - Static variable in class scenes.game.GameController
    Number of tile columns in the world map.
    Consumable - Interface in interfaces
    Represents an item that can be consumed by the player, such as a potion.
    consume(Player) - Method in interface interfaces.Consumable
    Applies this item's effect to the given player.
    consume(Player) - Method in class logic.base.BasePotion
    Consumes this potion, restoring the player's health by stat points.
    consume(Player) - Method in class logic.item.potion.HealPotion
    Consumes this potion, restoring 20% of the player's maximum health.
    count() - Method in record class scenes.boss.BattleMenuController.PotionEntry
    Returns the current stack count of this potion in the inventory.
    counter() - Method in record class scenes.boss.BattleMenuController.PotionEntry
    Returns the value of the counter record component.
    countItem(Class<?>) - Method in class logic.creatures.Player
    Returns the count of items of the specified type in the inventory.
    craft(int) - Method in class scenes.crafting.CraftingController
    Attempts to craft the recipe at the given index.
    craft(Player) - Method in interface interfaces.Craftable
    Crafts this item, consuming the required materials and gold from the player's inventory.
    craft(Player) - Method in class logic.base.BaseArmor
    Crafts this armor by consuming the required materials and gold from the player.
    craft(Player) - Method in class logic.base.BaseWeapon
    Crafts this weapon by consuming the required materials and gold from the player.
    CRAFT - Enum constant in enum class scenes.game.GameController.BuildingType
     
    Craftable - Interface in interfaces
    Represents an item that can be crafted using materials and gold.
    CraftingController - Class in scenes.crafting
    Controller for the crafting station scene.
    CraftingController(Player) - Constructor for class scenes.crafting.CraftingController
    Creates a new CraftingController and builds the recipe catalogue.
    CraftingController.CraftResult - Record Class in scenes.crafting
    Immutable result of a crafting attempt.
    craftingPrice - Variable in class logic.base.BaseArmor
    Gold cost required to craft this armor.
    CraftingView - Class in scenes.crafting
    JavaFX view for the crafting station overlay.
    CraftingView(CraftingController, Runnable) - Constructor for class scenes.crafting.CraftingView
    Creates a new CraftingView.
    CraftResult(boolean, String) - Constructor for record class scenes.crafting.CraftingController.CraftResult
    Creates an instance of a CraftResult record class.
    createHardStonePickaxe() - Static method in class logic.pickaxe.Pickaxe
    Creates a Hard Stone Pickaxe with mining power 5.
    createIronPickaxe() - Static method in class logic.pickaxe.Pickaxe
    Creates an Iron Pickaxe with mining power 12.
    createItem() - Method in class logic.stone.baseStone
    Factory method that creates one instance of the ore item dropped by this node.
    createItem() - Method in class logic.stone.HardStone
    Factory method that creates one instance of the ore item dropped by this node.
    createItem() - Method in class logic.stone.Iron
    Factory method that creates one instance of the ore item dropped by this node.
    createItem() - Method in class logic.stone.Mithril
    Factory method that creates one instance of the ore item dropped by this node.
    createItem() - Method in class logic.stone.NormalStone
    Factory method that creates one instance of the ore item dropped by this node.
    createItem() - Method in class logic.stone.Platinum
    Factory method that creates one instance of the ore item dropped by this node.
    createItem() - Method in class logic.stone.Vibranium
    Factory method that creates one instance of the ore item dropped by this node.
    createMithrilPickaxe() - Static method in class logic.pickaxe.Pickaxe
    Creates a Mithril Pickaxe with mining power 45.
    createNormalStonePickaxe() - Static method in class logic.pickaxe.Pickaxe
    Creates a Normal Stone Pickaxe with mining power 3.
    createPlatinumPickaxe() - Static method in class logic.pickaxe.Pickaxe
    Creates a Platinum Pickaxe with mining power 27.
    createVibraniumPickaxe() - Static method in class logic.pickaxe.Pickaxe
    Creates a Vibranium Pickaxe with mining power 100.
    createWoodenPickaxe() - Static method in class logic.pickaxe.Pickaxe
    Creates a Wooden Pickaxe with mining power 2.

    D

    damage() - Method in record class logic.creatures.Player.SkillResult
    Returns the value of the damage record component.
    def - Variable in class logic.base.BaseArmor
    Defense bonus granted to the player when this armor is equipped.
    DEFEAT - Enum constant in enum class scenes.boss.BossController.BattleState
    The player has been defeated.
    defense - Variable in class logic.base.BaseCreature
    Base defense value used to reduce incoming damage.
    description() - Method in record class scenes.shop.ShopController.ShopItem
    Returns the value of the description record component.
    doDefend() - Method in class scenes.boss.BossController
    Performs the player's Defend action, doubling DEF for the enemy's next turn.
    doEnemyTurn() - Method in class scenes.boss.BossController
    Executes the enemy's turn: applies attack (with possible crit), berserk debuff, and shield wall.
    doPlayerAttack() - Method in class scenes.boss.BossController
    Performs the player's normal attack against the current boss.
    doRestHeal() - Method in class scenes.boss.BossController
    Performs the Rest action, recovering 10% of the player's max HP without using an item.
    doSkill(int) - Method in class scenes.boss.BossController
    Activates the player skill at the given index if it is ready and it is the player's turn.
    dropAmount - Variable in class logic.stone.baseStone
     
    dropItems() - Method in class logic.stone.baseStone
    Generates the list of items dropped when this node is fully mined.
    dropMoney() - Method in interface interfaces.Lootable
    Returns the amount of gold dropped by this entity upon defeat.
    dropMoney() - Method in class logic.creatures.Monster
    Returns the amount of gold this monster drops upon defeat.
    durability - Variable in class logic.stone.baseStone
     
    dx - Variable in class scenes.game.GameController.MonsterEntity
    Current X component of the wander movement velocity.
    dy - Variable in class scenes.game.GameController.MonsterEntity
    Current Y component of the wander movement velocity.

    E

    EasyBoss - Class in logic.creatures
    Represents Akaza, the easy-tier boss demon.
    EasyBoss() - Constructor for class logic.creatures.EasyBoss
    Creates a new EasyBoss (Akaza) with preset stats.
    EasyMonster - Class in logic.creatures
    A weak enemy found on the game world map (Rui tier).
    EasyMonster() - Constructor for class logic.creatures.EasyMonster
    Creates a new EasyMonster with preset stats.
    ENEMY_TURN - Enum constant in enum class scenes.boss.BossController.ActionResult
    Control passes to the enemy turn.
    ENEMY_TURN - Enum constant in enum class scenes.boss.BossController.BattleState
    The enemy is taking its turn.
    equals(Object) - Method in class logic.base.BaseItem
     
    equals(Object) - Method in record class logic.creatures.Player.SkillResult
    Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.
    equals(Object) - Method in class logic.util.ItemCounter
     
    equals(Object) - Method in record class scenes.boss.BattleMenuController.PotionEntry
    Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.
    equals(Object) - Method in record class scenes.boss.BossController.BossInfo
    Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.
    equals(Object) - Method in record class scenes.crafting.CraftingController.CraftResult
    Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.
    equals(Object) - Method in record class scenes.shop.ShopController.BuyResult
    Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.
    equals(Object) - Method in record class scenes.shop.ShopController.ShopItem
    Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.
    equip(Player) - Method in interface interfaces.Equipable
    Applies this item's stat bonuses to the given player.
    equip(Player) - Method in class logic.base.BaseArmor
    Applies this armor's stat bonuses to the player.
    equip(Player) - Method in class logic.base.BaseWeapon
    Applies this weapon's damage bonus to the player's attack stat.
    Equipable - Interface in interfaces
    Represents an item that can be equipped and unequipped by the player, such as a weapon or armor.
    equipArmor(BaseArmor) - Method in class logic.creatures.Player
    Equips the given armor, unequipping any previously equipped armor first.
    equipArmor(BaseArmor) - Method in class scenes.inventory.InventoryController
    Equips the given armor on the player.
    equipWeapon(BaseWeapon) - Method in class logic.creatures.Player
    Equips the given weapon, unequipping any previously equipped weapon first.
    equipWeapon(BaseWeapon) - Method in class scenes.inventory.InventoryController
    Equips the given weapon on the player.

    F

    facingTile() - Method in class scenes.game.GameController
    Returns the grid coordinates [row, col] of the tile the player is currently facing.
    FloatingText(double, double, String, Color, long) - Constructor for class scenes.game.GameController.FloatingText
    Creates a new FloatingText at the given world position.

    G

    GameController - Class in scenes.game
    Controller for the main game world scene.
    GameController(Player, Pickaxe) - Constructor for class scenes.game.GameController
    Creates a new GameController, generates the world, spawns monsters, and positions the player at the centre of the map.
    GameController.BuildingType - Enum Class in scenes.game
    The type of building the player is adjacent to on the game world map.
    GameController.FloatingText - Class in scenes.game
    A short piece of text that floats upward from a world position and fades out over time.
    GameController.MonsterEntity - Class in scenes.game
    Represents a live monster entity on the world map, including its position, AI state, and movement variables.
    GameOverController - Class in scenes.gameover
    Controller for the game-over / victory scene.
    GameOverController(boolean, Player) - Constructor for class scenes.gameover.GameOverController
    Creates a new GameOverController and initialises particle positions and velocities.
    GameOverView - Class in scenes.gameover
    JavaFX view for the game-over / victory scene.
    GameOverView(GameOverController) - Constructor for class scenes.gameover.GameOverView
    Creates a new GameOverView.
    GameView - Class in scenes.game
    JavaFX view for the main game world scene.
    GameView(GameController) - Constructor for class scenes.game.GameView
    Creates a new GameView and pre-loads all images and sub-scene overlays.
    getAnimFrame() - Method in class scenes.game.GameController
    Returns the current animation frame index.
    getAtk() - Method in class logic.base.BaseArmor
    Returns the attack bonus.
    getAttack() - Method in class logic.base.BaseCreature
    Returns the base attack power.
    getBossColor() - Method in class scenes.boss.BossController
     
    getBossIndex() - Method in class scenes.boss.BossController
     
    getBossName() - Method in class scenes.boss.BossController
     
    getCd() - Method in class logic.base.BaseWeapon
    Returns the cooldown of this weapon in seconds.
    getCooldown(int) - Method in class scenes.boss.BattleMenuController
    Returns the remaining cooldown turns for the skill at the given index.
    getCount() - Method in class logic.util.ItemCounter
    Returns the current quantity of this item.
    getCraftingPrice() - Method in interface interfaces.Craftable
    Returns the gold cost required to craft this item.
    getCraftingPrice() - Method in class logic.base.BaseArmor
    Returns the gold cost to craft this armor.
    getCraftingPrice() - Method in class logic.base.BaseWeapon
    Returns the gold cost to craft this weapon.
    getCurrentBoss() - Method in class scenes.boss.BossController
     
    getCurrentPage() - Method in class scenes.inventory.InventoryController
    Returns the zero-based index of the currently displayed page.
    getDef() - Method in class logic.base.BaseArmor
    Returns the defense bonus.
    getDefense() - Method in class logic.base.BaseCreature
    Returns the defense value used to reduce incoming damage.
    getDefense() - Method in class logic.creatures.Player
    Returns the player's defense stat.
    getDmg() - Method in class logic.base.BaseWeapon
    Returns the damage bonus granted by this weapon.
    getDurability() - Method in interface interfaces.Mineable
    Returns the current durability of this node.
    getDurability() - Method in class logic.stone.baseStone
    Returns the current durability of this node.
    getEquippedArmor() - Method in class logic.creatures.Player
    Returns the currently equipped armor, or null if none.
    getEquippedWeapon() - Method in class logic.creatures.Player
    Returns the currently equipped weapon, or null if none.
    getFacing() - Method in class scenes.game.GameController
    Returns the direction the player is currently facing.
    getFloatingTexts() - Method in class scenes.game.GameController
    Returns the list of active floating-text pop-ups.
    getGold() - Method in class logic.creatures.Player
    Returns the player's current gold amount.
    getHealth() - Method in class logic.creatures.Player
    Returns the player's current health points.
    getHealthPoint() - Method in class logic.base.BaseCreature
    Returns the current health points.
    getHp() - Method in class logic.base.BaseArmor
    Returns the max HP bonus.
    getInventory() - Method in class logic.creatures.Player
    Returns the player's inventory as a list of ItemCounter entries.
    getInvincibleFrames() - Method in class scenes.game.GameController
    Returns the number of remaining player invincibility frames after taking damage.
    getItem() - Method in class logic.util.ItemCounter
    Returns the item being tracked.
    getItems() - Method in class scenes.shop.ShopController
    Returns the list of items available for purchase in the shop.
    getLastEnemyActionMs() - Method in class scenes.boss.BossController
     
    getLog() - Method in class scenes.boss.BossController
     
    getLuck() - Method in class logic.creatures.Player
    Returns the player's luck stat.
    getMaxDurability() - Method in interface interfaces.Mineable
    Returns the maximum durability of this node.
    getMaxDurability() - Method in class logic.stone.baseStone
    Returns the maximum durability of this node.
    getMaxHealth() - Method in class logic.creatures.Player
    Returns the player's maximum health points.
    getMaxHealthPoint() - Method in class logic.base.BaseCreature
    Returns the maximum health points.
    getMaxStack() - Method in class logic.base.BaseItem
    Returns the maximum number of this item allowed per inventory slot.
    getMenuCtrl() - Method in class scenes.boss.BossController
     
    getMenuState() - Method in class scenes.boss.BattleMenuController
    Returns the currently open menu state.
    getMonsters() - Method in class scenes.game.GameController
    Returns the list of live monster entities on the world map.
    getName() - Method in class logic.base.BaseItem
    Returns the name of this item.
    getName() - Method in class logic.pickaxe.Pickaxe
    Returns the display name of this pickaxe.
    getNotifMsg() - Method in class scenes.game.GameController
    Returns the most recently triggered notification message.
    getNotifTime() - Method in class scenes.game.GameController
    Returns the system time (ms) when the current notification was set.
    getPageItems() - Method in class scenes.inventory.InventoryController
    Returns the slice of the inventory items that belong to the current page.
    getParticleCount() - Method in class scenes.gameover.GameOverController
    Returns the total number of particles managed by this controller.
    getPickaxeHolder() - Method in class scenes.game.GameController
    Returns the single-element array holding the player's active pickaxe.
    getPickaxeHolder() - Method in class scenes.shop.ShopController
    Returns the pickaxe holder array (a reference shared with the game world).
    getPlayer() - Method in class scenes.boss.BossController
     
    getPlayer() - Method in class scenes.crafting.CraftingController
    Returns the player associated with this crafting session.
    getPlayer() - Method in class scenes.game.GameController
    Returns the player character.
    getPlayer() - Method in class scenes.gameover.GameOverController
    Returns the player associated with this game-over session.
    getPlayer() - Method in class scenes.inventory.InventoryController
    Returns the player associated with this inventory session.
    getPlayer() - Method in class scenes.shop.ShopController
    Returns the player associated with this shop session.
    getPlayerX() - Method in class scenes.game.GameController
    Returns the player's current X position in pixels.
    getPlayerY() - Method in class scenes.game.GameController
    Returns the player's current Y position in pixels.
    getPotions(Player) - Method in class scenes.boss.BattleMenuController
    Returns a list of all potions currently in the player's inventory.
    getPower() - Method in class logic.pickaxe.Pickaxe
    Returns the mining power of this pickaxe.
    getPr() - Method in class scenes.gameover.GameOverController
    Returns the radius array for all particles.
    getPrice() - Method in interface interfaces.Buyable
    Returns the purchase price of this item.
    getPx() - Method in class scenes.gameover.GameOverController
    Returns the X-coordinate array for all particles.
    getPy() - Method in class scenes.gameover.GameOverController
    Returns the Y-coordinate array for all particles.
    getRecipe() - Method in interface interfaces.Craftable
    Returns the list of materials and quantities required to craft this item.
    getRecipe() - Method in class logic.item.armor.HardstoneArmor
    Returns the list of materials and quantities required to craft this item.
    getRecipe() - Method in class logic.item.armor.IronArmor
    Returns the list of materials and quantities required to craft this item.
    getRecipe() - Method in class logic.item.armor.MithrilArmor
    Returns the list of materials and quantities required to craft this item.
    getRecipe() - Method in class logic.item.armor.PlatinumArmor
    Returns the list of materials and quantities required to craft this item.
    getRecipe() - Method in class logic.item.armor.StoneArmor
    Returns the list of materials and quantities required to craft this item.
    getRecipe() - Method in class logic.item.armor.VibraniumArmor
    Returns the list of materials and quantities required to craft this item.
    getRecipe() - Method in class logic.item.weapon.HardstoneSword
    Returns the list of materials and quantities required to craft this item.
    getRecipe() - Method in class logic.item.weapon.IronSword
    Returns the list of materials and quantities required to craft this item.
    getRecipe() - Method in class logic.item.weapon.MithrilSword
    Returns the list of materials and quantities required to craft this item.
    getRecipe() - Method in class logic.item.weapon.PlatinumSword
    Returns the list of materials and quantities required to craft this item.
    getRecipe() - Method in class logic.item.weapon.StoneSword
    Returns the list of materials and quantities required to craft this item.
    getRecipe() - Method in class logic.item.weapon.VibraniumSword
    Returns the list of materials and quantities required to craft this item.
    getRecipe() - Method in class logic.item.weapon.WoodenSword
    Returns null because the Wooden Sword cannot be crafted.
    getRecipes() - Method in class scenes.crafting.CraftingController
    Returns the full list of craftable recipes available at this station.
    getSpd() - Method in class logic.base.BaseArmor
    Returns the speed bonus.
    getSpeed() - Method in class logic.creatures.Player
    Returns the player's speed stat.
    getStarCount() - Method in class scenes.mainmenu.MainMenuController
    Returns the total number of stars managed by this controller.
    getStarR() - Method in class scenes.mainmenu.MainMenuController
    Returns the radius array for all stars.
    getStarX() - Method in class scenes.mainmenu.MainMenuController
    Returns the X-coordinate array for all stars.
    getStarY() - Method in class scenes.mainmenu.MainMenuController
    Returns the Y-coordinate array for all stars.
    getStat() - Method in class logic.base.BasePotion
    Returns the heal amount provided by this potion.
    getState() - Method in class scenes.boss.BossController
     
    getStoneObjects() - Method in class scenes.game.GameController
    Returns the grid of mineable stone/ore objects corresponding to rock tiles.
    getStrength() - Method in class logic.creatures.Player
    Returns the player's attack (strength) stat.
    getTotalPages() - Method in class scenes.inventory.InventoryController
    Returns the total number of pages needed to display the player's inventory.
    getWorld() - Method in class scenes.game.GameController
    Returns the 2-D tile-type grid representing the world map.

    H

    H - Static variable in class application.SceneManager
    The fixed window height in pixels.
    H - Static variable in class scenes.game.GameController
    Total world height in pixels (TILE_SIZE * ROWS).
    HardBoss - Class in logic.creatures
    Represents Muzan, the hard-tier final boss demon.
    HardBoss() - Constructor for class logic.creatures.HardBoss
    Creates a new HardBoss (Muzan) with preset stats.
    HardMonster - Class in logic.creatures
    A tough enemy found on the game world map (Daki tier).
    HardMonster() - Constructor for class logic.creatures.HardMonster
    Creates a new HardMonster with preset stats.
    HardStone - Class in logic.stone
    A tougher stone ore node found in the game world.
    HardStone() - Constructor for class logic.stone.HardStone
    Creates a new HardStone node.
    HardstoneArmor - Class in logic.item.armor
    Tier-2 craftable armor made from Normal Stone and Hard Stone.
    HardstoneArmor() - Constructor for class logic.item.armor.HardstoneArmor
    Creates a new HardstoneArmor with preset stats.
    HardstoneSword - Class in logic.item.weapon
    Tier-2 craftable sword made from Normal Stone and Hard Stone.
    HardstoneSword() - Constructor for class logic.item.weapon.HardstoneSword
    Creates a new HardstoneSword with preset stats.
    hashCode() - Method in class logic.base.BaseItem
     
    hashCode() - Method in record class logic.creatures.Player.SkillResult
    Returns a hash code value for this object.
    hashCode() - Method in class logic.util.ItemCounter
     
    hashCode() - Method in record class scenes.boss.BattleMenuController.PotionEntry
    Returns a hash code value for this object.
    hashCode() - Method in record class scenes.boss.BossController.BossInfo
    Returns a hash code value for this object.
    hashCode() - Method in record class scenes.crafting.CraftingController.CraftResult
    Returns a hash code value for this object.
    hashCode() - Method in record class scenes.shop.ShopController.BuyResult
    Returns a hash code value for this object.
    hashCode() - Method in record class scenes.shop.ShopController.ShopItem
    Returns a hash code value for this object.
    hasNextBoss() - Method in class scenes.boss.BossController
     
    hasStock() - Method in record class scenes.boss.BattleMenuController.PotionEntry
    Returns whether at least one potion of this type remains in the inventory.
    heal() - Method in record class logic.creatures.Player.SkillResult
    Returns the value of the heal record component.
    heal(int) - Method in class logic.base.BaseCreature
    Restores health by the given amount, capped at max health.
    heal(int) - Method in class logic.creatures.Player
    Restores the player's health by the given amount, capped at max health.
    HEAL - Enum constant in enum class scenes.boss.BattleMenuController.MenuState
     
    HealMenuView - Class in scenes.boss
    Overlay panel displayed when the player opens the BAG menu during a boss battle.
    HealMenuView(BattleMenuController, Consumer<BattleMenuController.PotionEntry>, Runnable, Runnable) - Constructor for class scenes.boss.HealMenuView
    Creates a new HealMenuView.
    HealPotion - Class in logic.item.potion
    A percentage-based healing potion that restores 20% of the player's maximum HP.
    HealPotion() - Constructor for class logic.item.potion.HealPotion
    Creates a new HealPotion.
    healthPoint - Variable in class logic.base.BaseCreature
    Current health points of this creature.
    hp - Variable in class logic.base.BaseArmor
    Max HP bonus granted to the player when this armor is equipped.

    I

    inBounds(int, int) - Method in class scenes.game.GameController
    Returns whether the grid position (r, c) is within the world bounds.
    interfaces - package interfaces
     
    InventoryController - Class in scenes.inventory
    Controller for the inventory overlay scene.
    InventoryController(Player) - Constructor for class scenes.inventory.InventoryController
    Creates a new InventoryController for the given player.
    InventoryView - Class in scenes.inventory
    JavaFX view for the inventory overlay.
    InventoryView(InventoryController, Runnable) - Constructor for class scenes.inventory.InventoryView
    Creates a new InventoryView.
    Iron - Class in logic.stone
    An iron ore node found in the game world (uncommon rarity).
    Iron() - Constructor for class logic.stone.Iron
    Creates a new Iron ore node.
    IronArmor - Class in logic.item.armor
    Tier-3 craftable armor made from Normal Stone and Iron.
    IronArmor() - Constructor for class logic.item.armor.IronArmor
    Creates a new IronArmor with preset stats.
    IronSword - Class in logic.item.weapon
    Tier-3 craftable sword made from Normal Stone and Iron.
    IronSword() - Constructor for class logic.item.weapon.IronSword
    Creates a new IronSword with preset stats.
    isAlive() - Method in class logic.base.BaseCreature
    Returns whether this creature is still alive.
    isArmorEquipped(BaseArmor) - Method in class scenes.inventory.InventoryController
    Returns whether the given armor is currently equipped by the player.
    isAttackAnim() - Method in class scenes.game.GameController
    Returns whether an attack animation is currently playing.
    isBerserkDebuffActive() - Method in class scenes.boss.BattleMenuController
    Returns whether the Berserk debuff (from Constant Flux) is active.
    isBroken() - Method in interface interfaces.Mineable
    Returns whether this node is fully depleted and can no longer be mined.
    isBroken() - Method in class logic.stone.baseStone
    Returns whether this node is fully depleted and can no longer be mined.
    isDead() - Method in class scenes.game.GameController.FloatingText
    Returns whether this floating text has exceeded its lifetime.
    isPendingAttackAnim() - Method in class scenes.boss.BossController
     
    isPendingBossShake() - Method in class scenes.boss.BossController
     
    isPendingPlayerShake() - Method in class scenes.boss.BossController
     
    isReady(int) - Method in class scenes.boss.BattleMenuController
    Returns whether the skill at the given index is ready to use (cooldown is 0).
    isShieldWallActive() - Method in class scenes.boss.BattleMenuController
    Returns whether the Shield Wall (Dead Calm) effect is active.
    isSolid(double, double) - Method in class scenes.game.GameController
    Returns whether the world position (px, py) is inside a solid tile (rock/ore).
    isStackable() - Method in class logic.base.BaseItem
    Returns whether this item can be stacked in the inventory.
    isWeaponEquipped(BaseWeapon) - Method in class scenes.inventory.InventoryController
    Returns whether the given weapon is currently equipped by the player.
    isWon() - Method in class scenes.gameover.GameOverController
    Returns whether the player won the game.
    ItemCounter - Class in logic.util
    Represents an item paired with a quantity in the player's inventory.
    ItemCounter(BaseItem, int) - Constructor for class logic.util.ItemCounter
    Creates a new ItemCounter with the given item and count.
    ITEMS_PER_PAGE - Static variable in class scenes.inventory.InventoryController
    Number of items shown on a single inventory page.

    K

    keyPressed(KeyCode) - Method in class scenes.game.GameController
    Registers that the given key has been pressed.
    keyReleased(KeyCode) - Method in class scenes.game.GameController
    Registers that the given key has been released.

    L

    life - Variable in class scenes.game.GameController.FloatingText
    How long (ms) this text should remain visible.
    loadBoss(int) - Method in class scenes.boss.BossController
    Loads the boss at the given index and resets the battle log.
    logic.base - package logic.base
     
    logic.creatures - package logic.creatures
     
    logic.item.armor - package logic.item.armor
     
    logic.item.potion - package logic.item.potion
     
    logic.item.weapon - package logic.item.weapon
     
    logic.pickaxe - package logic.pickaxe
     
    logic.stone - package logic.stone
     
    logic.util - package logic.util
     
    Lootable - Interface in interfaces
    Represents an entity that drops money when defeated.

    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class application.Main
    Standard Java entry point; delegates to Application.launch(java.lang.Class<? extends javafx.application.Application>, java.lang.String...).
    Main - Class in application
    Application entry point for "Tanjiro: The Swordsmith".
    Main() - Constructor for class application.Main
     
    MainMenuController - Class in scenes.mainmenu
    Controller for the main-menu scene.
    MainMenuController() - Constructor for class scenes.mainmenu.MainMenuController
    Creates a new MainMenuController and initialises star positions, speeds, and radii with random values.
    MainMenuView - Class in scenes.mainmenu
    JavaFX view for the main menu scene.
    MainMenuView(MainMenuController) - Constructor for class scenes.mainmenu.MainMenuView
    Creates a new MainMenuView and attempts to load the game logo image from resources.
    maxDurability - Variable in class logic.stone.baseStone
     
    maxHealthPoint - Variable in class logic.base.BaseCreature
    Maximum health points of this creature.
    maxStack - Static variable in interface interfaces.Stackable
    The default maximum stack size for stackable items.
    MediumBoss - Class in logic.creatures
    Represents Kokushibo, the medium-tier boss demon.
    MediumBoss() - Constructor for class logic.creatures.MediumBoss
    Creates a new MediumBoss (Kokushibo) with preset stats.
    MediumHealthPotion - Class in logic.item.potion
    A medium health potion that restores 100 HP when consumed.
    MediumHealthPotion() - Constructor for class logic.item.potion.MediumHealthPotion
    Creates a new MediumHealthPotion.
    MediumMonster - Class in logic.creatures
    A mid-tier enemy found on the game world map (Enmu tier).
    MediumMonster() - Constructor for class logic.creatures.MediumMonster
    Creates a new MediumMonster with preset stats.
    message() - Method in record class scenes.crafting.CraftingController.CraftResult
    Returns the value of the message record component.
    message() - Method in record class scenes.shop.ShopController.BuyResult
    Returns the value of the message record component.
    mine(int, Player) - Method in interface interfaces.Mineable
    Mines this node with the given power level and grants items to the player.
    mine(int, Player) - Method in class logic.stone.baseStone
    Mines this node with the given power level and grants items to the player.
    Mineable - Interface in interfaces
    Represents a stone or resource node that can be mined by the player.
    Mithril - Class in logic.stone
    A mithril ore node found in the game world (rare rarity).
    Mithril() - Constructor for class logic.stone.Mithril
    Creates a new Mithril ore node.
    MithrilArmor - Class in logic.item.armor
    Tier-5 craftable armor made from Platinum and Mithril.
    MithrilArmor() - Constructor for class logic.item.armor.MithrilArmor
    Creates a new MithrilArmor with preset stats.
    MithrilSword - Class in logic.item.weapon
    Tier-5 craftable sword made from Platinum and Mithril.
    MithrilSword() - Constructor for class logic.item.weapon.MithrilSword
    Creates a new MithrilSword with preset stats.
    moneyDrop - Variable in class logic.creatures.Monster
     
    monster - Variable in class scenes.game.GameController.MonsterEntity
    The underlying monster logic object (stats, health, etc.).
    monster() - Method in record class scenes.boss.BossController.BossInfo
    Returns the value of the monster record component.
    Monster - Class in logic.creatures
    Abstract base class for all monsters in the game.
    Monster(int, int, int, int) - Constructor for class logic.creatures.Monster
    Creates a new monster with the given stats and gold drop.
    MonsterEntity(Monster, double, double, int) - Constructor for class scenes.game.GameController.MonsterEntity
    Creates a new MonsterEntity.
    moveTimer - Variable in class scenes.game.GameController.MonsterEntity
    Timer (seconds) until the monster picks a new random wander direction.

    N

    name() - Method in record class scenes.boss.BattleMenuController.PotionEntry
    Returns the display name of the potion.
    name() - Method in record class scenes.boss.BossController.BossInfo
    Returns the value of the name record component.
    name() - Method in record class scenes.shop.ShopController.ShopItem
    Returns the value of the name record component.
    nextPage() - Method in class scenes.inventory.InventoryController
    Advances to the next page if one exists.
    NONE - Enum constant in enum class scenes.boss.BattleMenuController.MenuState
     
    NONE - Enum constant in enum class scenes.boss.BossController.ActionResult
    No meaningful state change occurred.
    NONE - Enum constant in enum class scenes.game.GameController.BuildingType
     
    NormalStone - Class in logic.stone
    A common stone ore node found throughout the game world.
    NormalStone() - Constructor for class logic.stone.NormalStone
    Creates a new NormalStone node.
    NOTIF_DURATION - Static variable in class scenes.game.GameController
    Duration in milliseconds that a notification message is displayed.

    O

    onBuy() - Method in record class scenes.shop.ShopController.ShopItem
    Returns the value of the onBuy record component.
    openHeal() - Method in class scenes.boss.BattleMenuController
    Opens the heal/bag menu.
    openSkills() - Method in class scenes.boss.BattleMenuController
    Opens the skill selection menu.

    P

    Pickaxe - Class in logic.pickaxe
    Represents a pickaxe used to mine ore nodes on the game world map.
    Pickaxe(String, int) - Constructor for class logic.pickaxe.Pickaxe
    Creates a new pickaxe with the given name and mining power.
    placeRock(int, int, int) - Method in class scenes.game.GameController
    Places a rock/ore tile at the given grid position and creates the matching stone object.
    Platinum - Class in logic.stone
    A platinum ore node found in the game world (rare rarity).
    Platinum() - Constructor for class logic.stone.Platinum
    Creates a new Platinum ore node.
    PlatinumArmor - Class in logic.item.armor
    Tier-4 craftable armor made from Iron and Platinum.
    PlatinumArmor() - Constructor for class logic.item.armor.PlatinumArmor
    Creates a new PlatinumArmor with preset stats.
    PlatinumSword - Class in logic.item.weapon
    Tier-4 craftable sword made from Iron and Platinum.
    PlatinumSword() - Constructor for class logic.item.weapon.PlatinumSword
    Creates a new PlatinumSword with preset stats.
    playBGM(String, double) - Static method in class audio.AudioManager
    Plays a looping background music track from the given classpath resource.
    Player - Class in logic.creatures
    Represents the player character.
    Player(int, int, int) - Constructor for class logic.creatures.Player
    Creates a new player with the given base stats.
    PLAYER_DEFEATED - Enum constant in enum class scenes.boss.BossController.ActionResult
    The player was defeated.
    PLAYER_SPEED - Static variable in class scenes.game.GameController
    Player movement speed in pixels per frame.
    PLAYER_TURN - Enum constant in enum class scenes.boss.BossController.ActionResult
    Control passes back to the player turn.
    PLAYER_TURN - Enum constant in enum class scenes.boss.BossController.BattleState
    It is the player's turn to choose an action.
    Player.SkillResult - Record Class in logic.creatures
    Immutable record representing the outcome of a player skill.
    PotionEntry(ItemCounter) - Constructor for record class scenes.boss.BattleMenuController.PotionEntry
    Creates an instance of a PotionEntry record class.
    prevPage() - Method in class scenes.inventory.InventoryController
    Goes back to the previous page if one exists.
    price() - Method in record class scenes.shop.ShopController.ShopItem
    Returns the value of the price record component.

    R

    refresh() - Method in class scenes.inventory.InventoryView
    Fully redraws the item list for the current page and updates the page navigation controls.
    refresh(List<BattleMenuController.PotionEntry>) - Method in class scenes.boss.HealMenuView
    Rebuilds the menu buttons and canvas for the given list of potions.
    removeBonus(int, int, int, int) - Method in class logic.creatures.Player
    Removes stat bonuses from the player, typically when unequipping an item.
    ROWS - Static variable in class scenes.game.GameController
    Number of tile rows in the world map.

    S

    sceneManager - Static variable in class application.Main
    The global scene manager used to switch between all game screens.
    SceneManager - Class in application
    Central scene coordinator for the game.
    SceneManager(Stage) - Constructor for class application.SceneManager
    Creates a new SceneManager and configures the window dimensions.
    scenes.boss - package scenes.boss
     
    scenes.crafting - package scenes.crafting
     
    scenes.game - package scenes.game
     
    scenes.gameover - package scenes.gameover
     
    scenes.inventory - package scenes.inventory
     
    scenes.mainmenu - package scenes.mainmenu
     
    scenes.shop - package scenes.shop
     
    setAtk(int) - Method in class logic.base.BaseArmor
    Sets the attack bonus.
    setAttack(int) - Method in class logic.base.BaseCreature
    Sets the attack power.
    setBerserkDebuff(boolean) - Method in class scenes.boss.BattleMenuController
    Sets the berserk debuff status effect.
    setCd(double) - Method in class logic.base.BaseWeapon
    Sets the cooldown.
    setCooldown(int, int) - Method in class scenes.boss.BattleMenuController
    Sets the cooldown for the skill at the given index.
    setCount(int) - Method in class logic.util.ItemCounter
    Sets the quantity.
    setCraftingPrice(int) - Method in class logic.base.BaseArmor
    Sets the crafting price.
    setCraftingPrice(int) - Method in class logic.base.BaseWeapon
    Sets the crafting price.
    setDef(int) - Method in class logic.base.BaseArmor
    Sets the defense bonus.
    setDefense(int) - Method in class logic.base.BaseCreature
    Sets the defense value.
    setDmg(int) - Method in class logic.base.BaseWeapon
    Sets the damage value.
    setGold(int) - Method in class logic.creatures.Player
    Sets the player's gold.
    setHealth(int) - Method in class logic.creatures.Player
    Sets the player's current health, clamped between 0 and max health.
    setHealthPoint(int) - Method in class logic.base.BaseCreature
    Sets the current health points directly.
    setHp(int) - Method in class logic.base.BaseArmor
    Sets the max HP bonus.
    setItem(BaseItem) - Method in class logic.util.ItemCounter
    Sets the item being tracked.
    setLeftMouse(boolean) - Method in class scenes.game.GameController
    Sets whether the left mouse button (attack) is held down.
    setLuck(int) - Method in class logic.creatures.Player
    Sets the player's luck stat.
    setMaxHealthPoint(int) - Method in class logic.base.BaseCreature
    Sets the maximum health points.
    setPower(int) - Method in class logic.pickaxe.Pickaxe
    Sets the mining power of this pickaxe.
    setRightMouse(boolean) - Method in class scenes.game.GameController
    Sets whether the right mouse button (mine) is held down.
    setShieldWall(boolean) - Method in class scenes.boss.BattleMenuController
    Sets the shield wall status effect.
    setSpd(int) - Method in class logic.base.BaseArmor
    Sets the speed bonus.
    setStat(int) - Method in class logic.base.BasePotion
    Sets the heal amount of this potion.
    setStrength(int) - Method in class logic.creatures.Player
    Sets the player's attack stat.
    setVolume(double) - Static method in class audio.AudioManager
    Adjusts the volume of the currently playing track.
    shieldWall() - Method in record class logic.creatures.Player.SkillResult
    Returns the value of the shieldWall record component.
    SHOP - Enum constant in enum class scenes.game.GameController.BuildingType
     
    ShopController - Class in scenes.shop
    Controller for the in-game shop scene.
    ShopController(Player, Pickaxe[]) - Constructor for class scenes.shop.ShopController
    Creates a new ShopController and builds the item catalogue.
    ShopController.BuyResult - Record Class in scenes.shop
    Immutable result of a purchase attempt.
    ShopController.ShopItem - Record Class in scenes.shop
    Immutable data holder for a shop catalogue entry.
    ShopItem(String, String, int, Consumer<Player>) - Constructor for record class scenes.shop.ShopController.ShopItem
    Creates an instance of a ShopItem record class.
    ShopView - Class in scenes.shop
    JavaFX view for the shop screen.
    ShopView(ShopController, Runnable) - Constructor for class scenes.shop.ShopView
    Creates a new ShopView.
    showBossRoom(Player, Pickaxe[]) - Method in class application.SceneManager
    Transitions to the boss battle room and starts the boss BGM.
    showGame(Player, Pickaxe) - Method in class application.SceneManager
    Transitions to the main game world screen.
    showGameOver(boolean, Player) - Method in class application.SceneManager
    Transitions to the game-over / victory screen.
    showMainMenu() - Method in class application.SceneManager
    Transitions to the main menu screen and starts the menu BGM.
    SKILL_COUNT - Static variable in class scenes.boss.BattleMenuController
    The number of player skills available in battle.
    SKILL_DESCS - Static variable in class scenes.boss.BattleMenuController
    Short descriptions for each skill shown in the skill menu, indexed 0–3.
    SKILL_ICONS - Static variable in class scenes.boss.BattleMenuController
    Unicode icon characters for each skill, indexed 0–3.
    SKILL_MAX_CD - Static variable in class scenes.boss.BattleMenuController
    Maximum cooldown turns for each skill after use, indexed 0–3.
    SKILL_NAMES - Static variable in class scenes.boss.BattleMenuController
    Display names for each skill, indexed 0–3.
    skillConstantFlux(BaseCreature) - Method in class logic.creatures.Player
    Skill: Constant Flux — strikes the target 3 times and applies a berserk debuff.
    skillDeadCalm() - Method in class logic.creatures.Player
    Skill: Dead Calm — activates a shield wall effect, blocking the next attack.
    skillKaguraDance(BaseCreature) - Method in class logic.creatures.Player
    Skill: Kagura Dance — deals double attack damage to the target.
    SkillMenuView - Class in scenes.boss
    Overlay panel that displays the player's four combat skills during a boss battle.
    SkillMenuView(BattleMenuController, IntConsumer, Runnable) - Constructor for class scenes.boss.SkillMenuView
    Creates a new SkillMenuView.
    SkillResult(int, int, boolean, boolean) - Constructor for record class logic.creatures.Player.SkillResult
    Creates an instance of a SkillResult record class.
    SKILLS - Enum constant in enum class scenes.boss.BattleMenuController.MenuState
     
    skillWaterWheel(BaseCreature) - Method in class logic.creatures.Player
    Skill: Water Wheel — deals damage and heals the player for 30% of the net damage dealt.
    SmallHealthPotion - Class in logic.item.potion
    A small health potion that restores 40 HP when consumed.
    SmallHealthPotion() - Constructor for class logic.item.potion.SmallHealthPotion
    Creates a new SmallHealthPotion.
    spd - Variable in class logic.base.BaseArmor
    Speed bonus granted to the player when this armor is equipped.
    Stackable - Interface in interfaces
    Represents an item that can be stacked in the player's inventory.
    start(Stage) - Method in class application.Main
    Called by JavaFX after the toolkit is initialised.
    StoneArmor - Class in logic.item.armor
    Tier-1 craftable armor made from Normal Stone.
    StoneArmor() - Constructor for class logic.item.armor.StoneArmor
    Creates a new StoneArmor with preset stats.
    StoneSword - Class in logic.item.weapon
    Tier-1 craftable sword made from Normal Stone.
    StoneSword() - Constructor for class logic.item.weapon.StoneSword
    Creates a new StoneSword with preset stats.
    stopBGM() - Static method in class audio.AudioManager
    Stops the currently playing background music, if any.
    success() - Method in record class scenes.crafting.CraftingController.CraftResult
    Returns the value of the success record component.
    success() - Method in record class scenes.shop.ShopController.BuyResult
    Returns the value of the success record component.

    T

    T_BOSS_DOOR - Static variable in class scenes.game.GameController
    Tile type: the boss door entrance.
    T_CRAFT - Static variable in class scenes.game.GameController
    Tile type: the crafting station entrance.
    T_GRASS - Static variable in class scenes.game.GameController
    Tile type: grass (decorative ground variant).
    T_GROUND - Static variable in class scenes.game.GameController
    Tile type: plain ground.
    T_HARD_ROCK - Static variable in class scenes.game.GameController
    Tile type: hard stone rock (solid, mineable).
    T_IRON_ROCK - Static variable in class scenes.game.GameController
    Tile type: iron ore rock (solid, mineable).
    T_MITHRIL - Static variable in class scenes.game.GameController
    Tile type: mithril ore rock (solid, mineable).
    T_NORMAL_ROCK - Static variable in class scenes.game.GameController
    Tile type: normal stone rock (solid, mineable).
    T_PATH - Static variable in class scenes.game.GameController
    Tile type: decorative path tile.
    T_PLATINUM - Static variable in class scenes.game.GameController
    Tile type: platinum ore rock (solid, mineable).
    T_SHOP - Static variable in class scenes.game.GameController
    Tile type: the shop building entrance.
    T_VIBRANIUM - Static variable in class scenes.game.GameController
    Tile type: vibranium ore rock (solid, mineable).
    takeDamage(int) - Method in class logic.base.BaseCreature
    Reduces this creature's health by the given damage minus its defense.
    text - Variable in class scenes.game.GameController.FloatingText
    The string to display.
    tickCooldowns() - Method in class scenes.boss.BattleMenuController
    Decrements all skill cooldowns by 1 turn (called at the end of each enemy turn).
    TILE_SIZE - Static variable in class scenes.game.GameController
    Width in pixels of a single world tile.
    toString() - Method in class logic.base.BaseItem
     
    toString() - Method in record class logic.creatures.Player.SkillResult
    Returns a string representation of this record class.
    toString() - Method in record class scenes.boss.BattleMenuController.PotionEntry
    Returns a string representation of this record class.
    toString() - Method in record class scenes.boss.BossController.BossInfo
    Returns a string representation of this record class.
    toString() - Method in record class scenes.crafting.CraftingController.CraftResult
    Returns a string representation of this record class.
    toString() - Method in record class scenes.shop.ShopController.BuyResult
    Returns a string representation of this record class.
    toString() - Method in record class scenes.shop.ShopController.ShopItem
    Returns a string representation of this record class.
    type - Variable in class scenes.game.GameController.MonsterEntity
    Difficulty tier: 0=easy, 1=medium, 2=hard.

    U

    unequip(Player) - Method in interface interfaces.Equipable
    Removes this item's stat bonuses from the given player.
    unequip(Player) - Method in class logic.base.BaseArmor
    Removes this armor's stat bonuses from the player.
    unequip(Player) - Method in class logic.base.BaseWeapon
    Removes this weapon's damage bonus from the player's attack stat.
    unequipArmor() - Method in class logic.creatures.Player
    Unequips the currently equipped armor, removing its stat bonuses.
    unequipArmor() - Method in class scenes.inventory.InventoryController
    Unequips the player's currently equipped armor, if any.
    unequipWeapon() - Method in class logic.creatures.Player
    Unequips the currently equipped weapon, removing its stat bonuses.
    unequipWeapon() - Method in class scenes.inventory.InventoryController
    Unequips the player's currently equipped weapon, if any.
    update() - Method in class scenes.boss.SkillMenuView
    Called every frame to keep cooldown indicators fresh.
    update() - Method in class scenes.crafting.CraftingView
    Refreshes the canvas to reflect the current player stats and recipe availability.
    update() - Method in class scenes.inventory.InventoryView
    Refreshes the player stats display (gold, HP, ATK, DEF, equipped items) without rebuilding the item list.
    update() - Method in class scenes.shop.ShopView
    Called every frame to refresh gold/HP display.
    update(double) - Method in class scenes.mainmenu.MainMenuController
    Advances every star's Y position by its individual speed.
    update(long, AnimationTimer) - Method in class scenes.game.GameController
    Advances the game state by one frame.
    update(List<BattleMenuController.PotionEntry>) - Method in class scenes.boss.HealMenuView
    Redraws the panel and updates button states for the given potion list.
    updateParticles() - Method in class scenes.gameover.GameOverController
    Advances every particle's position by its velocity for one frame.
    use(Mineable, Player) - Method in class logic.pickaxe.Pickaxe
    Uses this pickaxe on the given mineable target, applying the mining power.
    usePotion(Class<? extends BasePotion>) - Method in class logic.creatures.Player
    Uses one potion of the specified type from the inventory, applying its effect.
    usePotion(ItemCounter) - Method in class scenes.inventory.InventoryController
    Consumes the potion in the given counter, applying its effect to the player.
    usePotion(BattleMenuController.PotionEntry) - Method in class scenes.boss.BossController
    Consumes the selected potion from the player's inventory.

    V

    valueOf(String) - Static method in enum class scenes.boss.BattleMenuController.MenuState
    Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
    valueOf(String) - Static method in enum class scenes.boss.BossController.ActionResult
    Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
    valueOf(String) - Static method in enum class scenes.boss.BossController.BattleState
    Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
    valueOf(String) - Static method in enum class scenes.game.GameController.BuildingType
    Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
    values() - Static method in enum class scenes.boss.BattleMenuController.MenuState
    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
    values() - Static method in enum class scenes.boss.BossController.ActionResult
    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
    values() - Static method in enum class scenes.boss.BossController.BattleState
    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
    values() - Static method in enum class scenes.game.GameController.BuildingType
    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
    Vibranium - Class in logic.stone
    A vibranium ore node found in the game world (very rare rarity).
    Vibranium() - Constructor for class logic.stone.Vibranium
    Creates a new Vibranium ore node.
    VibraniumArmor - Class in logic.item.armor
    Tier-6 (top-tier) craftable armor made from Mithril and Vibranium.
    VibraniumArmor() - Constructor for class logic.item.armor.VibraniumArmor
    Creates a new VibraniumArmor with preset stats.
    VibraniumSword - Class in logic.item.weapon
    Tier-6 (top-tier) craftable sword made from Mithril and Vibranium.
    VibraniumSword() - Constructor for class logic.item.weapon.VibraniumSword
    Creates a new VibraniumSword with preset stats.
    VICTORY - Enum constant in enum class scenes.boss.BossController.BattleState
    The current boss has been defeated; waiting to advance to the next.
    vy - Variable in class scenes.game.GameController.FloatingText
    Vertical velocity in pixels per frame (negative = upward).

    W

    W - Static variable in class application.SceneManager
    The fixed window width in pixels.
    W - Static variable in class scenes.game.GameController
    Total world width in pixels (TILE_SIZE * COLS).
    WoodenSword - Class in logic.item.weapon
    The starter weapon given to the player at the beginning of the game.
    WoodenSword() - Constructor for class logic.item.weapon.WoodenSword
    Creates a new WoodenSword with preset stats.

    X

    x - Variable in class scenes.game.GameController.FloatingText
    Current X pixel position.
    x - Variable in class scenes.game.GameController.MonsterEntity
    Current X pixel position on the world map.

    Y

    y - Variable in class scenes.game.GameController.FloatingText
    Current Y pixel position.
    y - Variable in class scenes.game.GameController.MonsterEntity
    Current Y pixel position on the world map.
